action: designed store-level reputation carryover: demand multiplier clamp(0.90+(rep-70)*0.005,0.85,1.05), end-of-day delta from csat+inspection+abandonment clamped [-6,+6], rep clamped [40,100]; FNV-1a integer mix for deterministic week schedule and per-day seeds; day 0 anchored normal_day
added deterministic store-level input ReputationDemandMultiplier (default 1.0=neutral) to SimRunState and applied it in RatePerSimMinute so existing (scenario,seed) replays stay byte-identical

built tools/engine-selftest under .NET 8 and ran 10-scenario self-test (seed 12345) twice + career week (WeekSeed 777001) twice; 120/120 self-test PASS, 11/11 career PASS, final career JSON hash-identical across runs
probed six week seeds; confirmed equipment_failure days post negative reputation deltas (-2.7..-3.9) and clean weeks climb, proving carryover is causal not constant
added decoupled CareerHook autoload (F6 advance + user://career persistence) and documented the two Main.cs call sites; in-editor compile/run remains the standing blocker (no Godot in build env)
